workflows.name: Product Launch
workflows.description: Complete product launch workflow from final build to post-launch monitoring

steps.label: Final Build Check
steps.sop: Verify all features work, no console errors, mobile responsive

steps.label: Security Audit
steps.sop: Check env vars, HTTPS, remove debug code, verify no secrets

steps.label: Launch Assets
steps.sop: Create screenshots, banner, OG image, favicon

steps.label: Launch Copy
steps.sop: Write launch thread, email announcement, changelog

steps.label: Deploy
steps.sop: Deploy to production, verify live URL, test critical paths

steps.label: Post Announcement
steps.sop: Publish launch thread, tag relevant communities, reply to comments

steps.label: Monitor
steps.sop: Watch error logs, analytics, first 48h feedback

workflows.name: Content Sprint
workflows.description: Rapid content creation workflow for threads, posts, and articles

steps.label: Pick Content Angle
steps.sop: Review content calendar, find gaps, check what's performing

steps.label: Draft Content
steps.sop: Write thread + blog post, save to staging with DRAFT_ prefix

steps.label: Create Visual Assets
steps.sop: Create graphics, diagrams, visual hooks

steps.label: Review & Approve
steps.sop: Human reviews drafts, approves or sends back for edits

steps.label: Schedule & Publish
steps.sop: Schedule posts, update content calendar

workflows.name: Idea → Brief
workflows.description: Transform a raw idea into a structured dev brief

steps.label: Capture Idea
steps.sop: Human adds idea to bank with one-sentence description

steps.label: Validate Idea
steps.sop: Score: revenue potential, effort, goal alignment. Kill or continue.

steps.label: Research
steps.sop: 3 competitors, gap analysis, target audience

steps.label: MVP Scope
steps.sop: 5 must-have features max. Cut everything else.

steps.label: Dev Brief
steps.sop: Tech stack, components, timeline, Bolt-ready prompt

steps.label: Wireframes
steps.sop: Core screens, user flow, save as SKETCH_

steps.label: Health Check
steps.sop: Rate momentum 1-5 for each project. Be honest.

steps.label: Review Staging
steps.sop: Human approves, defers, or kills all staging items

steps.label: AI Analysis
steps.sop: Full context analysis, bottlenecks, recommendations

steps.label: Update Devlogs
steps.sop: Log entry for each active project

steps.label: Set Focus
steps.sop: Pick #1 priority for next week, define next action

steps.label: Build in Public Post
steps.sop: Honest progress update, lessons learned

workflows.name: Outreach Sprint
workflows.description: Find leads, draft messages, review, and log follow-ups

steps.label: Find Leads
steps.sop: Identify 5 high-value targets from ICP. Check Twitter, GitHub, communities.

steps.label: Draft Messages
steps.sop: Write personalised first-touch message for each lead. Max 5 sentences. Save to staging/.

steps.label: Review & Approve
steps.sop: Human reviews drafts in staging/. Edit or approve before sending.

steps.label: Log & Track
steps.sop: Add all sent messages to outreach-log.md. Set follow-up reminders.

workflows.name: Revenue Check
workflows.description: Monthly snapshot: income, expenses, runway, and next revenue action

steps.label: Finance Snapshot
steps.sop: Calculate current MRR, gap to £3000 target, and runway.

steps.label: Pricing Review
steps.sop: Review all product pricing. Flag if under-priced vs market.

steps.label: Revenue Priorities
steps.sop: Based on finance snapshot, pick the single highest-ROI revenue action for next 30 days.

steps.label: Review & Commit
steps.sop: Human reviews report, commits to top revenue action for the month.

steps.label: Dependency Check
steps.sop: Check for known vulnerabilities in dependencies

steps.label: Environment Variables
steps.sop: Verify no secrets in code, proper env handling

steps.label: Input Validation
steps.sop: Check all user inputs are validated/sanitized

steps.label: Authentication Review
steps.sop: Review auth flows, session handling, password policies

steps.label: Security Report
steps.sop: Document findings, severity, remediation steps
